title: Elastic (ESTC) Earnings Preview - November 2022
text: Elastic (ESTC) Earnings Preview for Q3 2022. Earnings Release Date: November 30, 2022. Key Expectations: Analysts projected Elastic would report an earnings per share (EPS) of -$0.10. The article notes that it is sometimes not an earnings beat or miss that most affects the price of a stock, but the guidance (or forecast). Recent Performance: In the previous quarter, the company exceeded EPS expectations by $0.02, yet the stock still declined 2.38% the following day. Over the preceding 52 weeks, shares had fallen 57.32%, trading at $57.77 as of November 28, 2022. Investor Sentiment: Long-term shareholders were positioned bearishly entering the earnings announcement, given the sustained negative returns. Investors were watching for whether the company would beat estimates and provide positive forward guidance for the upcoming quarter. Market Context: The broader market environment was challenging for growth stocks, with elevated interest rates and economic uncertainty weighing on valuations across the software sector.
